# OneAlgorithm

> OneAlgorithm is a Philadelphia, PA-based technology and marketing company specializing in IT consulting, website development, operations technology, staff augmentation, and digital marketing. We help Construction, Manufacturing, and E-Commerce businesses automate workflows, modernize systems, and grow through technology.

## About

- **Company name**: OneAlgorithm LLC
- **Location**: Philadelphia, PA, United States
- **Website**: https://onealgorithm.com
- **Contact**: https://onealgorithm.com/contact
- **Founded**: Philadelphia, PA

## Services

- **IT Consulting**: Technology strategy, system assessments, digital transformation roadmaps
- **Website Development**: Custom websites, e-commerce platforms, web applications, landing pages
- **Operations Technology**: Workflow automation, ERP/CRM integration, process optimization
- **Staff Augmentation**: On-demand developers, IT specialists, and tech talent
- **Digital Marketing**: SEO, paid ads, content marketing, social media, brand strategy

## Industries Served

- **Construction**: Project management systems, field operations tech, scheduling tools
- **Manufacturing**: Production automation, inventory systems, operations dashboards
- **E-Commerce**: Storefront development, fulfillment integration, marketing automation
